headline: AI for Legal Contracts: Automated Drafting, Clause Analysis, and Due Diligence
description: AI is transforming legal contracts -- analyzing thousands of documents in hours for due diligence, extracting obligations and risks with 95% accuracy, and drafting complete contracts from natural language instructions in under a minute. From Ironclad to Harvey AI ($3B valuation), LLMs are becoming the junior associate that never sleeps.

citation.name: AI for Legal Contract Analysis and Drafting: NLP, LLMs, and Due Diligence Automation (2024-2025 Comprehensive Survey)
Large Language Models for Legal Document Drafting: Capabilities, Limitations, and Ethics
